response.overview: Get ready to uncover some very sexy college girls in a DVD so provocative, it's reserved for mature audiences only - Playboy's "Uncensored College Girls." You'll see how open-minded these hot college girls really are - whether they're taking it all off in their dorm or slipping into a cozy shower - you'll see everything uncut and uncovered in eye-opening high definition and completely uncensored!
response.title: Playboy's Uncensored College Girls
